title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Teaching Assistant Posts
description: The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute (SVNIT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Teaching Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electronics Engineering, Ph.D., can apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the e...
